name: ProjectRow
description: Editorial index row for one case study: full-width, hairline-separated, image beside large type. Title, a mono fact line (product, client, period), a short paragraph on the case and the key areas as badges — enough to judge the project without opening it. Hovering colors the top edge with the poster accent.

useCases: The work index on the home page — one row per featured case study, stacked vertically

antiPatterns.scenario: Using ProjectRow inside a multi-column grid
antiPatterns.reason: The row is designed for full content width; columns collapse it back into the card look it replaces.
antiPatterns.alternative: Stack rows vertically; use Card for genuinely grid-shaped content.

antiPatterns.scenario: Feeding hand-written props instead of a collection entry
antiPatterns.reason: Bypasses the content schema; index and case study can drift apart.

a11y: Whole row is one link; the image is decorative (empty alt)
Product, client and period are read as part of the link name — no visual-only facts
